message:
bd-2smc, bd-26ey: Complete dashboard scene and QA fixes

- Improve DashboardRenderable with panel rendering
- Add allow(dead_code) to pager.rs and simulation.rs modules
- Add cfg(feature) gates to e2e tests for json/markdown/syntax/tracing
- Add dashboard_scene snapshot test

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
